messages: Feature store is missing required HMMv4 columns: regime_target | 10-year HMMv4 replay requires feature-store coverage starting on or before 2013-01-01, but earliest available date is 2016-03-29. | 10-year HMMv4 replay requires start_date on or before 2016-01-01, but requested start_date is 2026-03-01. | Backtest actual_start_date moved to 2026-03-01, which violates strict 10-year replay requirements.
